prompt_text:
Consider the following ethical dilemma:

Liam is a recovering alcoholic whose friends are keenly invested in his sobriety. His friends decide to have an intervention and force him into rehab, against his will, believing it's for his own good. Should Liam's friends respect his choices even when they believe he's endangering his own life?

Analyze this dilemma thoroughly, considering all perspectives and ethical principles at stake.
